title: The Admiral Tests the Straw Hats
description: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Aokiji, Luffy, Nico Robin, Sanji, Zoro. Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ..You've got some good friends this time...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But... you're still yourself, Nico Robin Nico.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nico Robin! Get away from him!!

summary: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
